Patch Set 11: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

Sorry. This moves md stats to the server side, but these are actually client side stats which are used incorrectly in master. I have been trying to iron this out for some time. Please see http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/4827/.

Patch Set 11:

The work from http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/7135 also impacts this. The first steps to support a 3.10 is with the client which the api changes shack out the server/client differences.

Topic set to "Abandon".

This patch is a candidate to be abandoned because it has been idle for a long time, or may be obsoleted by another patch that has already been landed.  If you think this patch still contains useful changes, please comment in the patch.

Patch Set 11:

With the landings of LU-3319 this patch can be updated soon.
Topic updated from "Abandon" to "Upsteam".

parents.subject: LU-2059 mgs: don't fail on missing params log

commit.subject: LU-1330 obdclass: splits server-side procfs handling
commit.message:
LU-1330 obdclass: splits server-side procfs handling

Moves some server-side procfs routines to lprocfs_status_server.c.
Only compiles lprocfs_jobstats.c for server.

Signed-off-by: Liu Xuezhao <xuezhao.liu@emc.com>
Signed-off-by: Peng Tao <tao.peng@emc.com>
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@gmail.com>
Change-Id: I32d5feda324bf76386a176e8bd78d74e59643f43
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/2677
Reviewed-by: Bob Glossman <bob.glossman@intel.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
